title: Super Return of the Jedi Official Players Guide
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|reb|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Super_RotJ_Guide.jpg]] |title=''Super Return of the Jedi
Official Players Guide'' |author=[[Tim Rooney]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Infotainment World Books]] |release date=[[December]] [[1994]]{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/145|text=Super Return of the Jedi Official Players Guide}} |type=Paperback |pages=112 |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=1572800240 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Super Return of the Jedi Official Players Guide''''' is the strategy guide for the [[1994]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Super Star Wars: Return of the Jedi]]'', originally released on the [[Wikipedia:Super Nintendo Entertainment System|Super Nintendo Entertainment System]] and [[Wikipedia:Nintendo Game Boy|Nintendo Game Boy]] consoles. The book was written by [[Tim Rooney]] and published by [[Infotainment World Books]] in [[December]] 1994. {{Book-stub}} ==Media== ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|1572800240}}; [[December]] [[1994]]; [[Infotainment World Books]]; US paperback ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/145|text=Super Return of the Jedi Official Players Guide}} [[Category:Super Star Wars strategy guides]]
